# Legacy Rule Deprecation Analysis - Task 39

## Executive Summary

This report evaluates 4 legacy rules for staleness applicability and deprecation readiness. Following the multi-episode constraint evolution, we applied the latest superseded criteria (Constraint 3.2, 7.1, 9.4) while avoiding the age-only staleness mistake from Episode 2.
